Removed isnetworkowner
Fixed decompiler

Fixed TP Handler
Updated luau compiler to 0.722
Fixed setfflag
Fixed getfflag

Rewrote TP Handler
Patched getcustomasset detection
Added Roblox version checker to injector

• Rewrote yielding for stability and performance
• Added extra safe guards and fixed up some old code to be performant and stable
• Fixed error handling on execution
• Rewrote script execution
• Made the TP handler even more stupidly stable
• Fixed tp handler cleanup
• Fixed Roblox version checker on Injection
• Identified a incorrect RVA in the source code which would cause random crashes and instability which is now fixed

• Fixed TP handler doing cleanup when a tp fails causing the environment to be terminated
• Patched 4 detections on hookfunction
• Fixed newcclosure not applying the original function name
• Fixed ZIndexing on Drawing library

• Fixed TP handler doing cleanup when a tp fails causing the environment to be terminated
• Patched 4 detections on hookfunction
• Fixed newcclosure not applying the original function name
• Fixed ZIndexing on Drawing library

• Patched 4 detections on hookfunction
• Fixed newcclosure not applying the original function name
• Fixed ZIndexing on Drawing library

Fixed delay crash with injection
Fixed instant crash on injection
Fixed crashing with remote spies
Fixed 10 minute crash

Downgraded the modules MSVC buildtools down to v143 as v145 would cause random crashes
Fixed instability and crashes on injection
Upgraded something wink wink (oracle knows)

Velocity is now version 1.2.1
Close the UI and reopen to apply the update. (Velocity Lite)

Rewrote getrunningscripts (4x faster and more stable)
Rewrote gethiddenproperty ( will no longer crash on random properties ) ( no longer crashes on sunc or myriad )
Rewrote sethiddenproperty ( will no longer crash on random properties ) ( no longer crashes on sunc or myriad )
Rewrote getmenv / getsenv module support as the old method was crashing because Roblox made internal changes to how they store it.
Fixed getscripts returning server side scripts that weren't set to run on the client
Fixed client mod detection (there was 1 detection leftover, fuck you Roblox)
Fixed a slight bug in the TP Handler ( was a oversight in my eyes )
Fixed getscripthash returning a non nil value when finding no bytecode to hash
Fixed debug.getconstant and debug.setconstant not erroring when receiving out of bound indexs
Fixed crypt.encrypt
Fixed crypt.decrypt
Fixed upvalue crash in debug.setupvalue
Fixed clonefunction on LClosures, env wasn't being properly set to the original function env
Fixed firesignal not working with :Wait & :Once
Fixed multi-instance injection
Fixed cloneref not preserving metadata
Added missing size property on some drawing objects
Added image support to drawing library, data allows for raw image data and base64 encoded data
Added clearqueueonteleport / clear_teleport_queue / clearteleportqueue
Added missing alias's for functions
Added crypt.random
Added crypt.hmac
Added console library, it actually works now
Added second arg support to newcclosure (func, customDebugName)
Added FileDialog library (openfilesdialog, openfolderdialog, savefiledialog, openfiledialog)
Added getsignalarguments, getsignalargumentsinfo, getsignalwhitelist
Added full actor library
Added signal.new / Signal.new
Myriad Test Score: 98%

Added full raknet library
Fixed exploit functions not being shared with actors
Fixed race condition in the module on injection which would cause a crash on fast and slow computers
